description: A deviation was recorded during manufacturing (e.g., a mixing time was exceeded). QA must assess the impact on product quality.

nodes.task_description: Open the deviation record that is pending QA assessment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the details of the manufacturing deviation.

nodes.task_description: Review the final QC test results for the affected batch to see if the deviation impacted key quality attributes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that despite the deviation, all final QC tests are within specification.

nodes.task_description: Document the assessment, conclude that there was no quality impact, and close the deviation report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds a formal QA assessment to the report and changes its status to 'Closed'.
